meaning: 1. the current period; 2. this term (usually in finance)
sentence: 本期杂志的封面人物是一位年轻歌手。
pinyin: Běn qī zá zhì de fēng miàn rén wù shì yī wèi nián qīng gē shǒu.
english: The cover person of this issue of the magazine is a young singer.

meaning: 1. film enthusiast; 2. movie fan; 3. CL:個|个[gè]
sentence: 她是个资深影迷，每周都去看电影。
pinyin: Tā shì gè zīshēn yǐngmí, měi zhōu dōu qù kàn diànyǐng.
english: She's a dedicated movie fan who goes to the cinema every week.

meaning: 1. to withdraw money from a bank
sentence: 我去银行取款，发现账户里没钱了。
pinyin: Wǒ qù yínháng qǔkuǎn, fāxiàn zhànghù lǐ méi qián le.
english: I went to the bank to withdraw money and found the account was empty.

sentence: 你记得去交费，别让电话停了。
pinyin: Nǐ jì de qù jiāo fèi, bié ràng diàn huà tíng le.
english: Remember to pay the bill so your phone doesn't get cut off.

sentence: 护士们每天都在医疗第一线工作。
pinyin: Hùshimen měitiān dōu zài yīliáo dìyīxiàn gōngzuò.
english: Nurses work on the front line of healthcare every day.
